report:
Subject: Modular Building Solution Quote for Firebrass Consultants

Dear Ashlin Quarry,

Thank you for considering Hloni Modular Prefab & Design (HMPD) for your modular building needs. We appreciate the opportunity to provide a quote for a 12m x 6m modular building solution in Durban, within your budget of R230,000.

After conducting a preliminary assessment, we are pleased to provide the following off-site quote:

**Modular Building Solution:**

* Size: 12m x 6m = 72m²
* Type: Single-storey, flat roof, prefabricated modular building
* Exterior Finish: Durable, low-maintenance exterior cladding (e.g., PVC or aluminium)
* Interior Finish: Standard interior fit-out, including:
+ Drywall partitions
+ Suspended ceiling
+ Fluorescent lighting
+ Power outlets and data points
* Doors and Windows: Standard aluminium doors and windows
* Roofing: Insulated, waterproof roof membrane
* Structural System: Steel frame with insulated panels

**Quote Breakdown:**

* Modular building unit (ex works): R145,000
* Transportation and delivery to Durban: R20,000
* Site installation and connection to services (e.g., electricity, water): R30,000
* Ancillary costs (e.g., crane hire, foundation preparation): R15,000
* VAT (15%): R20,000
* Total: R230,000

**Inclusions:**

* Design and engineering of the modular building
* Manufacturing and testing of the modular unit
* Delivery to site
* Installation and connection to services
* Commissioning and handover

**Exclusions:**

* Foundation preparation (e.g., slab, footings)
* Connection to municipal services (e.g., water, electricity, sewage)
* Any additional features or upgrades (e.g., air conditioning, security systems)

**Timeline:**

* Design and manufacturing: 6-8 weeks
* Delivery and installation: 2-3 weeks
* Total project duration: 8-11 weeks

Please note that this quote is valid for 30 days from the date of this email. We reserve the right to adjust the quote if there are any changes to the project scope or specifications.

If you are satisfied with the quote, please confirm your acceptance in writing, and we will proceed with the design and manufacturing process.

Thank you for considering HMPD for your modular building needs. We look forward to the opportunity to work with you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Senior Technical Lead
Hloni Modular Prefab & Design
[Contact Information]
